title: Main Page
content: 🪴 Welcome to my Digital Garden This is a collection of my thoughts, active projects, and technical deep-dives. Unlike a traditional blog, this space is "living"—notes here grow from seeds to evergreens as I learn more. 🛠️ Devlogs Tracking the progress of my latest builds and experiments. devlog-001 – Initializing the garden and custom subdomains. project-alpha – Building a new CLI tool for productivity. server-migration – Why I moved from Netlify to GitHub Pages. 🧠 Digital Garden (Thoughts) Raw ideas, mental models, and things I'm currently pondering. the-art-of-iteration – Why shipping fast beats shipping perfect. obsidian-workflow – How I organize my brain with Markdown. minimalism-in-ui – Thoughts on modern web design. 🔗 Find Me Online Platform Link GitHub https://github.com/p1xlized Portfolio pixlized.net Email contact-me@pixlized.net
